paper.title: Runaway blue main-sequence stars at high Galactic latitudes. Target selection with Gaia and spectroscopic identification

extraction.summary: 本文利用Gaia DR2天体测量和测光数据选取高银纬早型蓝星，通过低分辨率光谱跟踪观测识别出12颗MS逃逸星候选体。对12颗候选体进行银河系轨道积分后，仅2207-4329具有非零银河系逃逸概率P_esc=0.4，弹射速度V_ej=802 km/s，超过HVS 5的640 km/s，论文明确将其列为可能银河系非束缚的超逃逸星(hyper-runaway)候选体。其余11颗候选体P_esc=0.0（银河系束缚）。

method_chain.summary: 从Gaia DR2选取高银纬(|b|>=15°)蓝星样本(G_BP - G_RP <= 0.05)，要求视差精度、RUWE、信噪比等质量筛选，同时要求切向速度v_tan > 150 km/s。初始选取约2300颗星，随后获得其中48颗星的NTT/EFOSC2低分辨率(R~400)光谱。

source_refs.context: Abstract: selected ~2300 Gaia sources; obtained low-resolution spectra for 48 stars.

method_chain.summary: 对48颗星进行光谱拟合：利用ADS和Atlas12/SYNTHE模型网格，通过χ²拟合确定T_eff, log g, v_rad。同时进行SED拟合和消光校正。系统误差：T_eff约4%, log g约0.1 dex。
outputs: T_eff, log g, v_rad, E(44-55) for 48 stars

source_refs.context: Spectroscopic fitting method: chi-squared comparison with model grids.

method_chain.summary: 通过比对Gaia视差距离(1/varpi, 零点校正, Bailer-Jones)与分光距离D(SpT)区分MS/BHB候选体。MS假设下通过Ekstrom+2012轨迹插值获得质量/半径/光度；BHB假设下采用M=0.5±0.1 M_sun。12颗星在MS假设下达到1σ一致性。

source_refs.context: Distance-driven classification: 12 unique MS candidates via 1-sigma agreement.

method_chain.summary: 使用galpy在Irrgang+2013 Model I银河系势场中对12颗MS候选体进行轨道积分。蒙特卡洛抽样10000组初始条件。太阳位置R_sun=8.4 kpc, v_0=242 km/s, 本地逃逸速度614.4 km/s。计算v_rf, P_esc, e, L_Z, R_peri/apo, Z_max, R(Z=0), V_ej, tau_flight。
outputs: Orbital parameters for 12 MS candidates (Table t:orbit)

source_refs.context: Orbit simulation: galpy with Irrgang+2013 Model I; 10000 MC initial conditions.

method_chain.summary: 基于轨道积分评估银河系逃逸概率：P_esc为(v_rf - v_esc)>0的初始条件比例。仅2207-4329具有非零逃逸概率P_esc=0.4；其余候选体P_esc=0.0。2207-4329的V_ej=802 km/s，若确认为MS星将成为已知最快的超逃逸星。

source_refs.context: All but one bound; 2207-4329 P_esc=0.4; would be fastest hyper-runaway if confirmed MS.
Table t:spec line 2207-4329: MS candidate with short name 2207-4329.

inclusion_assessment.summary: 论文12颗MS逃逸星候选体中唯一可能银河系非束缚的候选体。P_esc=0.4，弹射速度V_ej=802 km/s。论文明确讨论其可能成为已知最快的hyper-runaway star，弹射速度超过HVS 5 (640 km/s)。若MS性质被高分辨率光谱确认，将是极端超逃逸星候选体。
inclusion_assessment.confidence_reason: 论文明确将2207-4329识别为具有非零银河系逃逸概率(P_esc=0.4)的候选体，并明确讨论其可能成为已知最快的hyper-runaway star。论文文本明确声明其为'possibly unbound'。

source_refs.context: 2207-4329 has P_esc=0.4; the only exception among MS candidates. If confirmed MS, fastest hyper-runaway star, exceeding HVS 5.
2207-4329 by far the fastest at 802 km/s; prominent among Galactic disc runaways with largest ejection velocities.
Conclusions: presented selection of bright early-type MS candidates; propose 12 stars as MS candidates.

candidate_groups_considered.reason: 论文轨道积分结果显示这11颗星的银河系逃逸概率P_esc=0.0，明确处于银河系束缚状态。虽然其中2259-4931和2307-3157的弹射速度超过经典逃逸机制上限(>450 km/s)，但论文并未声称它们为银河系非束缚候选体。按照Stella的HVS候选体边界定义，仅将论文明确讨论为可能非束缚(P_esc>0)的天体纳入候选体。这些银河系束缚的极端逃逸星属于hyper-runaway范畴但非HVS/unbound候选体。

source_refs.context: All but one candidate are bound to the Milky Way's potential, since they have v_rf on average two times smaller than v_esc.
Table t:orbit: orbital parameters for 12 MS candidates showing P_esc=0.0 for 11 stars.
Three candidates exceed 450 km/s ejection velocity, challenging classical scenarios; 2207-4329 farthest.

candidate_groups_considered.description: 27颗蓝水平分支(BHB)星候选体+2颗后BHB热演化星（1621-8350, 1944-4628）。分光距离与视差距离在BHB假设下达到一致性，被分类为年老低质量晕族星。运动学呈现晕族逆行特征（Toomre图中大负向V分量）。
candidate_groups_considered.reason: BHB星候选体属于银河系晕族年老恒星。论文虽指出其具有高速运动学特征，但明确将其分类为BHB晕族星，未进行银河系逃逸概率评估，也未将其识别为HVS候选体。BHB星的高速度源自晕族随机运动而非弹射机制。

source_refs.context: Table t:bhb_physical: 27 BHB candidates + 2 post-EHB candidates.
BHB stars have mostly retrograde motions, belong to halo population.
